title: rubus × microcarpus
intro: Rubus × microcarpus, also known as the Raspberry Bramble or Red Raspberry Bramble, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of raspberries and blackberries. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, diarrhea, and inflammation due to its high content of antioxidants and tannins. The health benefits of Rubus × microcarpus include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
